title: Department Highest Salary
input_format: Table: Employee with columns id (int), name (varchar), salary (int), departmentId (int). Table: Department with columns id (int), name (varchar).
output_format: Result table with columns Department, Employee, Salary showing the highest salary employee(s) in each department
example_input:
Table: Employee
| id | name  | salary | departmentId |
| 1  | Joe   | 70000  | 1            |
| 2  | Jim   | 90000  | 1            |
| 3  | Henry | 80000  | 2            |
| 4  | Sam   | 60000  | 2            |
| 5  | Max   | 90000  | 1            |
example_output:
| Department | Employee | Salary |
| IT         | Jim      | 90000  |
| IT         | Max      | 90000  |
| Sales      | Henry    | 80000  |
